name: List Lattice Keys
description: Lists the keys or indices at a path in the user's lattice namespace. For maps, returns key names. For vectors/sequences, returns integer indices. Supports pagination via limit/offset for large collections (default limit 1000). Paths use '/' separators. Omit path or use '' to list top-level namespaces (g, s, j).

path.description: Path to list, e.g. 'g' (all agents), 'g/my-agent/tasks'. Omit to list top-level namespaces.
